card_name_verified_concern: OpenCard card_id is 'barclays-wyndham-earner-plus-biz' but searches show two distinct products: Wyndham Rewards Earner® Business Card ($95 AF) and Wyndham Rewards Earner® Plus Card ($75 AF, NOT business). 'Earner Plus Business' may not exist as a single product — verify card_id reflects actual product.
_review_reason: Card name disambiguation needed. If this is the Wyndham Rewards Earner Business Card ($95 AF): primary recurring benefit is 15,000 anniversary points (≈2 free nights at lower-tier Wyndham — POINTS not USD, excluded per OpenCard convention). If it's the Earner Plus consumer ($75 AF), different product. No clean USD recurring credit either way. Diamond status (qualitative). 10% discount on award stays (qualitative).
